name: Seafood Risotto from Southern Living
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel shrimp and devein if desired; set aside.
2. Cut sea scallops in half crosswise; set aside.
3. Rinse squid under cold running water. Cut into 1/2-inch slices; set aside.
4. Remove "beards" from mussels. Scrub mussels and clams with a brush to remove grit; set aside.
5. Cook garlic in olive oil over medium heat, stirring constantly, until shrimp turn pink. Remove shrimp and scallops with a slotted spoon; set aside.
6. Cook squid in skillet over medium heat, stirring constantly, until cooked through. Remove with a slotted spoon; set aside.
7. Add mussels, clams, wine, and the next three ingredients to the skillet. Bring to a boil over high heat. Cover and cook, shaking pan frequently, until shells open. Discard unopened shells.
8. Add shrimp, scallops, and squid. Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heated.
9. Remove seafood with a slotted spoon, reserving liquid. Stir liquid into cooked risotto.
10. Place risotto on a lettuce-lined serving plate. Top with seafood mixture. Sprinkle with Gremolata, salt, and pepper; serve immediately.
